title: Cauldron Brewing
description: Simple datapack allowing you to brew potions in a cauldron.
body:
![Title Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ef56eee68d23897891cc4100198dba61af3c16.png)
## **Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.6**
# **Cauldron Brewing**
![Title image showing off all the different potion colors in cauldrons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/303927ec1db1b1a4408f21f7e2fe8b1032904ae2.png)
Allows you to brew all potions using a cauldron instead of a brewing stand.
Currently only available for 1.20.6
## Usage
![A set of cauldrons for all supported heat sources.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f9405333e45c6267be730c3a1de5329948ed412.png)
Place a cauldron over a heat source. (e.g. Fire, Campfire, Magma)

Drop any ingredient you would use in a brewing stand in the water.

![A Cauldron in a witches hut containing a strength potion.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f307c915d0de57a6c336766e3730cb85e7040c7a.png)
Hold a bottle in your hand to see what the cauldron contains.

Use a bottle on the cauldron to fill it with the potion.
## Installation
1. Drop "CauldronBrewing(resourcepack)" in your resourcepack folder
2. Drop "CauldronBrewing(datapack)" in your worlds datapacks folder
